entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: Tá lúb ag seisiún maith foghlama

entries.source: A practical look at how AI can make learning clearer, more personal, and more accessible without turning students into passive answer collectors.
entries.value: Amharc praiticiúil ar conas is féidir le IS foghlaim a dhéanamh níos soiléire, níos pearsanta, agus níos inrochtana gan daltaí a iompú ina mbailitheoirí freagraí éighníomhacha.

entries.source: A serious learning companion should help with the work around the answer:
entries.value: Ba chóir do chompánach foghlama dáiríre cabhrú leis an obair timpeall an fhreagra:

entries.source: Access matters
entries.value: Tá tábhacht le rochtain

entries.source: AI learning
entries.value: Foghlaim IS

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: Níor chóir do chompánach foghlama IS ligean air gur údarás draíochta é. Níor chóir dó éiginnteacht a scriosadh, múinteoirí a athsholáthar, ná foghlaimeoirí a oiliúint chun freagraí a chóipeáil. Bíonn na córais is fearr macánta faoi theorainneacha agus soiléir faoin difríocht idir cabhair agus cur ar aghaidh.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
entries.value: Iarr céad chéim bheag.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS do réasúnaíocht a sheiceáil.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: ag seiceáil an féidir leis an bhfoghlaimeoir an smaoineamh a mhíniú ar ais.

entries.source: choosing the right starting level;
entries.value: an leibhéal tosaigh ceart a roghnú;

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: Críochnaigh le hachoimre ó chuimhne.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: Do fhoghlaimeoir, is féidir leis sin mothú an-difriúil ó chuardach ar an ngréasán. Tugann cuardach leathanaigh. Tugann compánach foghlama conair.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: Le haghaidh léargas níos leithne ar conas a cheanglaíonn na leathanaigh phoiblí, brabhsáil mapa foghlama IS, na moil ábhair, nó leabharlann prasanna foghlama IS. Tá na leathanaigh sin deartha chun an táirge a dhéanamh intuigthe d’fhoghlaimeoirí agus infhaighte do chórais chuardaigh gan na codanna úsáideacha a cheilt taobh thiar de bhalla cuntais.

entries.source: giving examples before abstractions when needed;
entries.value: samplaí a thabhairt roimh theibíochtaí nuair is gá;

entries.source: Information is everywhere. Understanding is still unevenly distributed.
entries.value: Tá faisnéis i ngach áit. Tá tuiscint fós scaipthe go míchothrom.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: ag tabhairt faoi deara cad a thuigeann an foghlaimeoir cheana;

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: Tá teagasc príobháideach cumhachtach, ach níl sé ar fáil go cothrom. Is féidir le hardán poiblí foghlama IS saor in aisce cabhrú leis an mbearna rochtana sin a laghdú trí chéad áit fhoighneach foghlama a thabhairt do níos mó daoine.

entries.source: Repair the weak spot.
entries.value: Deisigh an pointe lag.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: Abair an sprioc i ngnáthchaint.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Tosaigh le Learn Anything má tá ábhar agat i gcuimhne. Bain triail as Socratic Instruction más mian leat ceisteanna seachas míniú. Úsáid Flashcard Builder nuair a chaithfidh tú cuimhneamh, nó Exam Prep Planner nuair is í an fhadhb do chuid ama staidéir a eagrú.

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: Ní chuireann sé sin múinteoirí, pobail, leabhair, ná scoileanna in ionad. Tugann sé bealach eile isteach d’fhoghlaimeoirí. Is féidir leis cabhrú le dalta obair bhaile a thosú, tuismitheoir coincheap a mhíniú, tógálaí féin-mhúinte cód a fhoghlaim, nó duine fiosrach ceist a leanúint a d’fhéadfadh imeacht murach sin.

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: Sin í an bhearna a fhágann go bhfuil compánach foghlama IS tábhachtach. Déanann compánach maith níos mó ná ceist a fhreagairt. Cabhraíonn sé le foghlaimeoir pointe tosaigh a roghnú, míníonn sé an smaoineamh i ngnáthchaint, seiceálann sé an ndearna sé ciall, agus leanann sé ar aghaidh nuair nach dtagann an chéad mhíniú i dtír.

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: Tá sé sin thar a bheith tábhachtach d’obair bhaile. Ní í an cheist úsáideach "An féidir le IS an freagra a tháirgeadh?" De ghnáth is féidir. Is í an cheist úsáideach "An féidir le IS cabhrú leis an bhfoghlaimeoir an chonair chuig an bhfreagra a thuiscint?" Sin é an fáth a ndíríonn an treoir ar staidéar le IS gan caimiléireacht ort féin ar leideanna, seiceálacha, agus cleachtadh aistrithe.

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: Sin é an caighdeán atá inspir ag iarraidh a bhaint amach: foghlaim a mhothaíonn inrochtana, pearsanta, spraíúil, agus úsáideach d’aon duine le fiosracht agus nasc idirlín.

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Sin é an fáth a scarann inspir poist foghlama ina modhanna poiblí. Más mian leat míniú séimh, tosaigh le Learn Anything. Más mian leat réasúnú trí choincheap seachas léacht a fháil, úsáid Socratic Instruction. Má tá tú greamaithe ar thasc, is fearr a oireann Homework Coach ná inneall freagraí cineálach. Ba chóir don fhormáid freastal ar an bpost foghlama.

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: Tá an lúb sin le feiceáil ar fud an ardáin. Briseann Math Step Coach fadhb ina céimeanna. Tiontaíonn Flashcard Builder nótaí ina gcleachtadh cuimhne. Cuireann Quiz Me On Trivia aisghabháil faoi bhrú leis. Cabhraíonn Writing Coach le dréacht a fheabhsú gan an scríbhneoir a ionadú.

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: Ní freagra fada amháin iad na seisiúin foghlama IS is fearr. Breathnaíonn siad níos cosúla le lúb:

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: Ní freagra foirfe an toradh is fearr. Is é an nóiméad é nuair a deir foghlaimeoir, "Sílim go dtuigim anois é. Lig dom triail a bhaint as."

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: Tá an smaoineamh coitianta simplí: coinnigh an foghlaimeoir gníomhach. Ba chóir do IS smaointeoireacht a dhéanamh níos éasca le tosú, ní gan ghá le déanamh.

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: Is é an leagan is éasca de theagascóir IS bosca a thugann freagraí snasta. Tá sé sin úsáideach uaireanta, ach ní leor é. Is féidir le foghlaimeoir nach bhfaigheann ach freagraí imeacht agus an leathanach críochnaithe ach an scil gan athrú.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: Ba chóir don fhormáid freastal ar an bpost foghlama.

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: Is é muinín an sprioc

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: Is é an beart tábhachtach tosú le fíorphost foghlama, ní le pras foirfe. Is féidir le compánach maith an chonair a mhúnlú nuair a thosaíonn tú.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: Ní freagairt amháin atá sa phost

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: Tá cúpla nós i gcoiteann ag na huirlisí foghlama IS is úsáidí:

entries.source: They adapt the level without making the learner feel small.
entries.value: Cuireann siad an leibhéal in oiriúint gan an foghlaimeoir a dhéanamh beag.

entries.source: They ask questions when the goal is unclear.
entries.value: Cuireann siad ceisteanna nuair atá an sprioc doiléir.

entries.source: They encourage practice, not just reading.
entries.value: Spreagann siad cleachtadh, ní léamh amháin.

entries.source: They give examples that match the learner's world.
entries.value: Tugann siad samplaí a mheaitseálann domhan an fhoghlaimeora.

entries.source: They make uncertainty visible when facts need checking.
entries.value: Déanann siad éiginnteacht infheicthe nuair is gá fíricí a sheiceáil.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.
entries.value: Sin é an fáth a bhfuil inspir tógtha timpeall ar mhodhanna foghlama. Uaireanta teastaíonn míniú soiléir uait. Uaireanta teastaíonn ceisteanna Sócraiteacha. Uaireanta teastaíonn tráth ceiste, spléachchártaí, cleachtadh díospóireachta, cóitseálaí scríbhneoireachta, nó rólghlacadh stairiúil.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: Tá sé seo tábhachtach do scoileanna agus teaghlaigh mar ní tallann an chéad bhac go minic. Is é costas cabhrach, eagla ceist "bhunúsach" a chur, nó easpa duine foighneach ag an nóiméad cruinn a thagann mearbhall. Laghdaíonn compánach poiblí saor in aisce costas an tosaithe.

entries.source: Try the companion
entries.value: Bain triail as an gcomhluadar

entries.source: Try the step yourself.
entries.value: Bain triail as an gcéim tú féin.

entries.source: turning passive reading into practice;
entries.value: léamh éighníomhach a iompú ina chleachtadh;

entries.source: What an AI learning companion should do for everyone
entries.value: Cad ba cheart do chomhluadar foghlama IS a dhéanamh do chách

entries.source: What it should not do
entries.value: Cad nár cheart dó a dhéanamh

entries.source: What the companion should provide
entries.value: Cad ba cheart don chomhluadar a sholáthar
